verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Draw me Into Your Presence Draw me Into Your Presence Draw me Into Your Presence I want to Know You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For there's Life In Your presence Yes, there's Life In Your presence There is Life In Your presence I want to Know You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Where else can I go? Where else can I Hide? Only in your presence, Lord. Can I find peace of mind.
